name: Ullis Tapes
description:
Ullis Tapes er tilbake på Verket lørdag 23. mai!

DJ Baby Stinky, Ruff-Da-Menace & DJ BS-ONE will spin the black wax non stop all night until the clock runs out and it's time to be quiet in the capital of Norway to preserve our core values (unless everybody in the place breaks out in a massive riot and fights for our right to party!)

DUB/HOUSE/UKG/BREAKS/DUBSTEP/HARDCORE/JUNGLE

Save the vinyl!
